programme.title: The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: Humorous adaptation of the classic Dr Seuss childrens book, in which two housebound children are visited by a cat who saves them from their rainy-day boredom by bringing mayhem to their house.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young lawyer joins a small but prestigious law firm only to find out that most of their clients are on the wrong side of the law. The company is helping to launder mob money, get clients off charges and even murder partners who threaten to blow their cover, but when the FBI come calling to gather evidence on the lawyers colleagues, he is caught between a rock and a hard place, juggling his life and his liberty.

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A desperate and crazed man, with the help of an accomplice, takes a local Brooklyn bank hostage with plans to rob it in order to pay for his lovers sex-change operation.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Big-budget tale of the battle for survival in a world where dry land has disappeared with the melting of the polar ice caps. One man, who has become amphibious, tries to protect survivors on an artificial atoll made from scrap metal by taking on a gang of marauding pirates. He is also intent on discovering if there is any truth in the myth that there is still some land left above water.

programme.title: Mars Attacks!
programme.desc: Bug-eyed martians in flying saucers descend on unsuspecting Planet Earth to wreak untold havoc, as they kidnap a chat-show host and a scientist for evil experiments and blow up famous monuments around the world. Who can protect our defenceless world from raygun-toting aliens?

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Supernatural comedy about three New York parapsychology professors who decide to set up a ghost-catching agency. Soon a storm of malevolent spirits threatens to destroy the city, and the mysterious contents of a womans fridge suggest a paranormal Armageddon.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The phantom-fighters return to the streets of New York when they come to the aid of a woman who fears that her baby is the target of ghostly forces. Four years after Dr Peter Venkman broke up with Dana Barrett, she appeals for help to save her son when an arch-demon trapped in an oil painting wants to take over his body. The old team reunite and trace the source of the trouble to a sinister underground river of slime.

programme.title: Blade Runner
programme.desc: An ex-cop sets out on the trail of androids who have mutinied in a bid to extend their limited lifespan and fled back to Earth.

programme.title: Mars Attacks!
programme.desc: Bug-eyed martians in flying saucers descend on unsuspecting Planet Earth to wreak untold havoc, as they kidnap a chat-show host and a scientist for evil experiments and blow up famous monuments around the world. Who can protect our defenceless world from raygun-toting aliens?

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: A modern-day teenager is transported back to the 1950s, where he encounters his mother and father in their youth.

programme.title: Back to the Future Part II
programme.desc: Time-travel sequel with Marty McFly and the eccentric inventor Doc Brown travelling back and forth in time to stop their nemesis tampering with history. By stealing the time machine and travelling back in time himself, Biff Tannen gives his younger self a book containing fifty years of sports statistics which he uses to amass an enormous gambling fortune and power.

programme.title: Back to the Future Part III
programme.desc: Marty McFly travels to the American Wild West of 1885 in a desperate bid to save Doc Brown from becoming another victim of a black-hatted gunslinger.

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire
programme.desc: When reporter Daniel Malloys curiosity leads him to interview the mysterious Louis De Pointe Du Lac, the last thing he expects is to find himself talking to a vampire. Louis tells him his life story, about how he was turned, and the vampire Lestat who made him what he is.

programme.title: The Exorcist
programme.desc: A famous actress calls upon medical science for help when her daughter begins behaving strangely, but without any success. Then, as bizarre and horrific incidents involving the daughter increase, her mother turns in desperation to the Church, and to a priest who doubts his own faith.

programme.title: The Exorcist
programme.desc: A famous actress calls upon medical science for help when her daughter begins behaving strangely, but without any success. Then, as bizarre and horrific incidents involving the daughter increase, her mother turns in desperation to the Church, and to a priest who doubts his own faith.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: Humorous adaptation of the classic Dr Seuss childrens book, in which two housebound children are visited by a cat who saves them from their rainy-day boredom by bringing mayhem to their house.

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: Engaging family tale based on Dick King-Smiths classic story about an orphaned piglet which is adopted by a sheepdog and learns how to herd sheep. Babe at first seems destined to end up on the dining table at Christmas, but the farmer realises that the animals unusual talent may bring him glory in the sheepdog trials.

programme.title: The Witches
programme.desc: Creepy fairy tale following the fortunes of a young orphan who becomes embroiled in a supernatural adventure. Brought up on his kindly grandmothers scary stories about witches, he stumbles on a real coven while on holiday. Overhearing their plans to capture all the children in Britain, he sets out to stop them, remaining undeterred throughout - even when he has been turned into a mouse.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit and his three sisters -- Flopsy, Mopsy and Cotton-Tail -- enjoy spending their days in Mr. McGregors vegetable garden. When one of McGregors relatives suddenly moves in, hes less than thrilled to discover a family of rabbits in his new home. A battle of wills soon breaks out as the new owner hatches scheme after scheme to get rid of Peter -- a resourceful rabbit who proves to be a worthy and wily opponent.

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: When evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel take Papa Smurf, the Smurfs embark on a mission to the real world to save him. With help from some new friends, they must discover what defines their destiny to save the universe.

programme.title: The Golden Compass
programme.desc: In a parallel universe, young orphan Lyra Belacqua resides in Oxford under the patronage of her dashing adventurer Uncle, Lord Asriel. When Lyra comes into possession of an alethiometer, a compass that truthfully answers any question, there are people who will do anything to get hold of it, and Lyra finds herself on an epic quest to the frozen North to safeguard the future of her entire world.

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Charlie Bucket comes from a poor family, and spends most of his time dreaming about the chocolate that he loves but usually cant afford. Things change when Willy Wonka, head of the very popular Wonka Chocolate empire, announces a contest in which five gold tickets have been hidden in chocolate bars. Charlie is one of the five kids who finds a lucky ticket and goes on a tour of Wonkas chocolate factory.

programme.title: The Ant Bully
programme.desc: This is the story of a ten-year-old boy named Lucas Nickle, who has just moved to a new neighbourhood, has no friends, and is the target for the local bully and his gang. His parents are leaving for a honeymoon in Puerto Vallarta, so they are too busy to attend to his problems. His sister is distracted by her cellular phone, and the grandmother is obsessed with UFOs and aliens.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.desc: Writer Ambrose Bierce and his fellow travellers converge upon a vampire-infested cantina in 1914 Mexico.

When they reach the Kansas farmhouse of an all-American family, the humans do everything they can to fend off the critters, but they cannot free themselves of the ferocious outsiders.

programme.title: Wolf Man
programme.desc: Attacked by an unseen animal, Blake and his family barricade themselves inside a farmhouse as the creature prowls the perimeter. As the night stretches on, however, he begins to behave strangely, transforming into something unrecognizable.

programme.title: Until Dawn
programme.desc: Exploring an abandoned visitor centre, Clover and her friends encounter a masked killer who murders them one by one. However, when they mysteriously wake up at the beginning of the same night, theyre forced to relive the terror over and over again.

programme.title: The Nun
programme.desc: When a young nun at a cloistered abbey in Romania takes her own life, a priest with a haunted past and a novice on the threshold of her final vows are sent by the Vatican to investigate. Together, they uncover the orders unholy secret. Risking not only their lives but their faith and their very souls, they confront a malevolent force in the form of a demonic nun.

programme.title: Annabelle
programme.desc: A possessed doll that was purchased for their new born child creates havoc, and destroys a young couples lives.

programme.desc: Years after the tragic death of their daughter, a former toy maker and his wife welcome a nun and six orphaned girls into their farmhouse. Terror soon strikes when one child finds a seemingly innocent doll that appears to have a life of its own.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: When five friends cause a deadly car accident, they cover up their involvement and keep it a secret rather than face the consequences. One year later, they find themselves stalked by a mysterious killer who knows what they did last summer.

programme.title: M3GAN 2.0
programme.desc: A military-grade robotic weapon known as Amelia becomes increasingly self-aware and dangerous to the human race. Hoping to stop it, Gemma, an advocate for oversight of AI, decides to resurrect M3GAN, making it faster, stronger, and more lethal.

programme.title: A Quiet Place
programme.desc: A family must navigate their lives in silence to avoid mysterious creatures that hunt by sound. Knowing that even the slightest whisper or footstep can bring death, a couple protect their children while desperately searching for a way to fight back.

programme.title: A Quiet Place: Day One
programme.desc: When New York City comes under attack from an alien invasion, a woman and other survivors try to find a way to safety. They soon learn that they must remain absolutely silent as the mysterious creatures are drawn to the slightest sound.

programme.title: 28 Years Later
programme.desc: Still living in quarantine due to the rage virus, a survivor decides to venture into the dark heart of the mainland. He soon discovers a mutation that has spread to not only the infected, but other survivors as well.

programme.title: Salems Lot
programme.desc: A writer returns to his hometown and discovers that the residents are being turned into vampires.

programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: David Dutton is the sheriff of picture-perfect American town Ogden Marsh. One night and out of the blue one of its citizens shows up during a baseball game with a shot-gun and ready to kill. This is the beginning of a spiral of violence and mayhem.

programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: David Dutton is the sheriff of picture-perfect American town Ogden Marsh. One night and out of the blue one of its citizens shows up during a baseball game with a shot-gun and ready to kill. This is the beginning of a spiral of violence and mayhem.

programme.title: The Radleys
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary family has a dark secret, as they are vampires. They choose not to drink blood despite their natural cravings, but their truth is revealed one day.

programme.title: Naked Singularity
programme.desc: An idealistic New York City public defender, burnt out by the failing justice system and seeing signs of a collapsing universe, takes matters into his own hands when he joins a former client on a high-stakes drug heist.

programme.title: Psycho
programme.desc: Classic chiller about the grisly goings-on in a remote motel run by a timid and decidedly odd young man and his domineering mother. The film totally changed Hollywoods perception of the horror genre and broke many of the movie industrys taboos.

programme.desc: An assassin on his last assignment travels to Fuerteventura to kill a man hes never met.

programme.title: Restless

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: When Madame Au Lait is called away to give Chikidee her ping pong lesson, Tommy and Tallulah bake a massive sticky carroty cake on their own. Ignoring the recipe, they make so much mixture that the oven explodes when they try to cook it, showering the whole town with sticky gunk and bringing Pufferty to a standstill! The race is on to free him before Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah are having fun helping their friends, but dont stop first to ask what their friends need. So Lopsiloo finds herself on the wrong side of the bridge, the wrong goods are served in Battersbys shop and Puffertys favourite ball is thrown out when they tidy his kennel. It is only when they take McCogginss scooter away for cleaning that they finally realise the error of their ways.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Madame Au Lait is cleaning the clockhouse so Tommy and Tallulah take their jammy sandwiches to their room to eat. When some jam gets splodged on a blanket, they dont want to upset Madame Au Lait so they clean it themselves, but when they hang it out to dry on Pufferty, it floats off and lands in a muddy puddle! Whatever will Madame Au Lait say.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Chikidee is making slow but steady progress learning to fly, so Tommy and Tallulah try to help by making her a gigantic paper aeroplane. They dont realise, until its too late, that Chikidee cant control it and has no idea how to land! Chime Time is imminent but they cant leave their friend adrift in the sky. How can they talk her down safely?

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah offer to do the polishing so that Madame Au Lait can make their favourite fruity trifle. While she is out buying the ingredients, the twins go polish crazy, thinking that the more they use the happier Madame Au Lait will be and the more trifle she will make. The clockhouse is gleaming when Madame Au Lait returns, but when she sets a hoof on the floor she finds that it as slippery as an ice rink.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The twins are asked to collect McCogginss bell for a town performance. Despite Battersbys warning that the clapper is fragile and doesnt have a spare, Tommy and Tallulah manage to break it. Deciding that they must make a replacement, they look everywhere for something to use and try some very unusual options. Will the bell be ready for Chime Time?

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: When Tommy and Tallulah agree to babysit the spring chicks while Madame Au Lait tends to Mother Chicks hurt wing, they dont realise that how much of a handful the chicks will be. The twins are also taking part in the town kite display today, but somehow the chicks end up surfing on their kite, high in the sky! The twins must stage an airborne rescue before Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah are organising McCogginss pile of interesting junk when a vitally important spring goes missing. They cant chime the time without it! The twins chase the spring all over town as it bounces around causing chaos, eventually ending up attaching Pufferty to his kennel. Every time he tries to go somewhere, the spring pulls him back.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Confuse-Us the Carp
programme.desc: Its a topsy-turvy day as Bao Bao the panda and Horace the hare set off on their morning walk - nothing is as it should be and the two friends cant understand why. Confuse-Us the wise old carp tells them that the ping and the pong are out of balance. The friends set off to try and put things right.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Bao Baos Long Goodbye
programme.desc: Bao Bao the panda and Cassandra the crane are best friends. When Cassandra announces that autumn is almost here and she will soon leave, Bao Bao is upset at her imminent departure and prepares himself for life without her. Bao Bao learns that Cassandra is only leaving for the winter months, and he should make the most of her company while he can.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the Savannah Craze
programme.desc: Doris the duck is fed up of always playing the same old games with her friends. She wants to invent a new and fun game they can all play but her other friends are reluctant to join in. She heads off on her own, and soon the other animals are intrigued by the strange bouncy boingy noises that can be heard across the savannah.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of a Long Night in the Jungle
programme.desc: Giggles and Tickles are so excited about their birthday the next day that they vow to stay up all night long so that they dont miss a single moment of it. The other animals on the savannah are tired and soon go to bed. Can the mischievous monkeys find ways to keep themselves awake all night and still enjoy their birthday?

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of a the Record-Breaking Puffins
programme.desc: Gunnar the gull is encouraging the puffins to break as many records as they can. Their noise is distracting Hercule Moustache, who is busy trying to build a beach sculpture. The puffins do their best not to disturb the walrus.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Ronald and His Boulders
programme.desc: Ronald the rhinos favourite pastime is bashing boulders - but one day he realises there are no more boulders left to bash on the savannah. Ronald sets out to find something else to bash - with almost catastrophic consequences.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the House of Leaves
programme.desc: Nelson the elephant wants to build the biggest and best house of leaves ever. His nephew Nigel is eager to help out, but Nelson is worried that the leaf house might be too fragile for his exuberant young nephew. When the house of leaves comes crashing down, Nelson wastes no time in telling Nigel off.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Gertie the Goat
programme.desc: Gertie the goat has agreed to take Bao Bao the panda on a climbing expedition up the So Hi Mountains. The other animals advise Gertie against the trip, since pandas are not renowned for their climbing skills. Will Gertie and Bao Bao prove the others wrong, or will they need some help from their friends?

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the Jungle Ball

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the Great Rains
programme.desc: The savannah animals are busy preparing for the great rains, which are due any day. The rains flood the plains every year and they will have to take shelter on Blue Mountain. This year it is Giggles and Tickles turn to keep watch for the start of the rain.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah find harvesting very slow when they volunteer to pick Lopsiloos vegetables. Surely there must be some way to speed it up? However, when they hit upon the idea of using Pufferty to pull all the vegetables up at once, they are shocked to find that Puffertys carriages unhook and run amok through Tickety Town.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The twins are asked to deliver a precious package to Madame Au Lait and decide that a ride with Pufferty is safest way to transport it. However, when Hopparoo challenges the lovable dog train to a race, the package bounces out of the carriage and embarks upon a crazy journey round Tickety Town, with Tommy and Tallulah in hot pursuit.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tickety Town is covered in fallen leaves, so Tommy and Tallulah are using McCogginss new prototype street sweeper to clear them. However, in their eagerness to speed things up, they go against his instructions and press the turbo button. Suddenly, the sweeper goes haywire, rampaging through town and sucking up anything in its path, including Madame Au Laits clock key and very nearly Hopparoo too.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The whole town gathers to take part in McCoggins treasure hunt. Whoever finds the most cogs will be the winner. Knowing that McCoggins hides the cogs in the same places every year, Tommy and Tallulah are cruising to victory, until they realise that a quick win will spoil everyones day, but when they borrow McCoggins special clockwork rollerskates to put the cogs back, the skates zoom out of control.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The twins decide that everyone must get active and turn Tickety town into a boot camp. With Tommy banging his drum and Tallulah blowing on her trumpet, soon everyone is lifting, running, puffing and panting. They are all so exhausted that they fall fast asleep, but with Chime Time imminent, they must find a way to wake up Puffertys wheels.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: When Hopparoo bursts all their bubbles with his sharp ears, the twins use McCoggins extra-strong bubble mixture instead and blow a bubble so huge that it engulfs Battersby, Madame Au Lait, McCoggins, Lopsiloo, Chikidee and finally Tommy and Tallulah themselves! Where is Hopparoo? Only his sharp ears can free them for Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah love dressing up and surprising each other with their crazy costumes, but when they decide to surprise everybody else in town too Hopparoo is not impressed. programme.desc: The lives of monkeys, chimps, orangutans and apes at Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre.

programme.title: Animals at Play
programme.desc: In the jungles of Thailand, clouded leopard cubs are chasing, climbing, jumping on each other and play fighting. they play these same games over and over again. The more they play, the more they hone their skills and eventually these cubs will become formidable tree-based hunters.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Valentino, Yutris and the rest of group two have fun as they visit group threes flooded classroom; three quarantine infants get the results of their TB tests; the residents of Bangamat Island do not welcome newcomers leading to a confrontation.

programme.title: Planet Shark
programme.desc: Meet the nomadic sharks thriving in the oceans depths, a lone blue shark in the Atlantic and hundreds of hammerheads in the Pacific.

programme.title: Malawi Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: Amanda goes on a white knuckle bush-whacking adventure to rescue a waterbuck caught by a poachers snare; the centres resident hyena is treated for fly-bitten ears; and Alma gets a mysterious late night monkey delivery.

programme.desc: A biologist searches for a giant otter den at the southern edge of the Brazilian Pantanal.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Crews require support from the fire brigade to rescue a woman whos fallen and is stuck inside her locked house. Plus, they help a child with a dangerously high temperature.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Crews attend an explosion, a dislocated knee and a motorcyclist whos spun off the road. An elderly patient is taken to the hospice via the beach.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics attend a man with a possible ruptured appendix, an anxious 91-year-old with Covid, and a head injury case.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Time is against ambulance crew mates Laura and Jason as they treat a 74-year-old woman who is having a stroke. Olly and V are called to a man whose heart is beating dangerously fast.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: In Oxford, crews help a child with signs of meningitis and take an injured cyclist to hospital. In Portsmouth, they help a man whos fallen and a patient with Crohns Disease.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The paramedics race to a lorry driver with a branch through his windscreen and a man with an irregular heartbeat, and help a family faced with a heart-breaking decision.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Following paramedics from the South Central Ambulance Service in Portsmouth and Oxford as they carry out their duties around Britain. Cameras are placed within ambulances, while the team wear body-mounted filming technology to capture all the action.

programme.desc: Claustrophobic prison cells that contain a story worthy of international acclaim, and a vast mountainside complex that held the power to change the world.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A secretive underground base that concealed the power to destroy nations, and a sprawling industrial relic clinging to the edge of an unforgiving waterfall.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the abandoned branch line between Holborn and Aldwych. And at Holloway Road they find out about the Tubes only spiral escalator.

programme.desc: The team have a record number of cars to auction, but Derek finds room for one more - a replica AC Cobra. A couple are reunited with their Volvo breakdown truck.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A classic car fan with a love of the Jaguar E-Type reluctantly sends his dream car to auction, hoping to buy a motorhome. Two Ford Escorts get Daves pulse racing.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Under the Bonnet
programme.desc: The team are known to bite off more than they can chew, and the Mini Mk2 is a perfect example.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.desc: The team struggles to explain how a DAF 33 gearbox works, and office manager Sarah attempts to bring order to the auto memorabilia sale.

programme.desc: Dave finds a very rare 70s Sunbeam Lotus that has been rotting away in a farmyard for 29 years, while a Morris Minor convertible goes under the hammer.

programme.title: Nurses Down Under
programme.desc: Emergency nurses fight to revive a woman in cardiac arrest, a patient with terminal lung failure undergoes a risky lung transplant and a breech birth has midwife Lucy braced for resuscitation.

programme.desc: Louis Theroux travels to San Francisco where a group of pioneering medical professionals help children who say they were born in the wrong body transition from boy to girl or girl to boy at ever younger ages.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Extreme Love
programme.desc: Louis travels to Phoenix, Arizona - the capital of dementia care. He spends time at Beatitudes, a residential institution, and also with those looking after loved ones at home to try to understand the struggle of living in a world of encroaching shadows - and of keeping relationships alive in circumstances that can be among the strangest and most challenging imaginable.

programme.desc: BAFTA award-winning Michael McIntyre hosts a special Christmas edition of his gameshow. programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Jordan Hutchison is an inspirational teenager. He has cerebral palsy and epilepsy, but this has not stopped him defying expectations and raising huge sums of money for charity. He currently lives with his parents, Jackie and Colin, and his siblings at his grandmothers house. He sleeps on an air bed, while the parents share rooms with the younger children. The family home is a shell after a series of building issues meant the family ran out of money with no way of finishing the work.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Single mother Julie Jones became a national news story when she promised to look after her dying friends children. Overnight Julies family grew from three children to eight. Nick Knowles and the team travel to Huntingdon where, with the help of the local community, they aim to transform Julies house into a home for this supersized family. They have just ten days in which to finish the build.

programme.title: Great Indian Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos `Bradshaws 1913 Handbook of Indian, Foreign and Colonial Travel leads him on a railway journey through the modern south Indian states of Karnataka and Tamil Nadu, from the former princely state of Mysore to the first stronghold of the East India Company in Chennai,formerly Madras.

programme.title: Great Indian Railway Journeys
programme.desc: On an epic railway journey from Lucknow in Uttar Pradesh to Kolkata in West Bengal, Michael Portillo uses his Bradshaws 1913 Handbook of Indian, Foreign and Colonial Travel, published when the British Raj was fifty-five years old, to chart a course through Indias history from the days of The East India Company to the dawn of independence.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave and Jack head to East Yorkshire to pick up a dusty Alfa Romeo and a 1930s Jowett. But Daves more taken with a possible Christmas present - a Carry On-style, bum-wobbling exercise machine.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up a lovingly restored 1925 Calthorpe motorbike that he thinks is more of a work of art than anything ever produced by Picasso.

programme.title: Nuremberg: Nazis on Trial
programme.desc: In 1945 the world watched as leading Nazis went on trial for their crimes. How did Commander-in-chief Goering attempt to reignite Nazi pride and how effective were his efforts?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team returns for a second helping of finds from the Isle of Wight at Queen Victorias Italianate seaside residence, Osborne. Expert Richard Price challenges Fiona Bruce to work out how three clocks have changed in value since 1977.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Celebrating the achievements of some of Britains most inspirational women, starting with Suffragettes and ending with modern-day heroines. Filmed in the Houses of Parliament, marking 100 years since women first won the right to vote in 1918.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul and his son Charlie head to Leicestershire to collect a vintage Albion truck. Steeped in nostalgia, both Paul and Charlie fall for the Albions charms.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: The team goes behind the scenes at Mathewsons, a North Yorkshire-based, family-run car auction business which uncovers rare vehicles in Thornton-le-Dale. It attracts classic car buyers from all over the country.

programme.title: Nuremberg: Nazis on Trial
programme.desc: In 1945 the world watched as leading Nazis went on trial for their crimes. How did Commander-in-chief Goering attempt to reignite Nazi pride and how effective were his efforts?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team returns for a second helping of finds from the Isle of Wight at Queen Victorias Italianate seaside residence, Osborne. Expert Richard Price challenges Fiona Bruce to work out how three clocks have changed in value since 1977.

programme.title: Cornwall with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon investigates the environmental challenges facing Cornwall and the rest of the country, and on the way encounters some of its iconic wildlife, including Britains largest predator, the huge grey seal.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics

programme.title: Great Indian Railway Journeys

programme.title: Kya Meri Sonam Gupta Bewafa Hai
programme.desc: Sintu, a dejected lover, pens down his feelings on a currency note which goes viral and triggers a chain of hilarious events. Will he overcome the heartbreak and find closure?

programme.title: Article 15
programme.desc: Based on the socio-political situation of India, the lives of police officers are followed. In a country where discrimination is everywhere, whether related to race or caste, the officers embark on a journey of acceptance and change.

programme.title: Laadla
programme.desc: A mill mechanic must sacrifice his love for a co-worker and marry his employers ambitious daughter.

programme.title: Chaalbaaz
programme.desc: Surprises are in store when twins who were separated at birth are suddenly reunited.

programme.title: Kick
programme.desc: A slippery thief plays an important part in the lives of a psychiatrist and her prospective husband, a police officer from India.

programme.title: Dream Girl
programme.desc: Karamveer gets a job at call centre due to his ability to talk in a womans voice. He garners a big fan following but soon gets in trouble with his overzealous clients.

programme.title: Baaghi: Rebels In Love
programme.desc: A bounty hunter and an agent with a price on his head realise they have a common enemy.

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Inspector Chulbul Pandey is transferred and promoted to Kanpur.There, he sabotages Baccha Bhaiyaas political image by revealing his immoral activities to the public, media and police force.

programme.desc: Two brothers have complicated romances with the daughter and niece of an old enemy.
